nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow honeyeater
nodes.summary: Yellow honeyeater（Stomiopera flava）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow honeyeater。

nodes.name: Yellow honeyeater
nodes.summary: The yellow honeyeater (Stomiopera flava) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Australia. Overview Its natural habitats are tropical and subtropical moist lowland forest and mangrove forest. The yellow honeyeater hovers in front of the spectacular flowers of the bottlebrush orchid (Coelandria smillieae), which appear in northern Queensland between August and November, while feeding upon the nectar and pollinating the flowers. The yellow honeyeater was previously placed in the genus Lichenostomus, but was moved to Stomiopera after a molecular phylogenetic analysis, published in 2011 showed that the original genus was polyphyletic. Gallery References External links Photos, audio and video of yellow honeyeater from Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Macaulay Library Recordings of yellow honeyeater from Graeme Chapman's sound archive
nodes.shortSummary: The yellow honeyeater (Stomiopera flava) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Australia.
